notes: Phase 8 has server-side env validation and root .env loading wired.

This repair keeps absolute envDir, preserves public/private env split, and adds a server-only root .env fallback parser because owner workstation force-fed env succeeded while normal .env loading failed.
Phase 8 remains open until the owner workstation proves regular valid-env app check/build/dev, missing-env fail-closed behavior, and professional CI.
